SKUs: AX-04827-B2 (44 units), AX-05512-C1 (96), FG-91144-A1 (200) — all quarantined

NCR-MER-2026-0247 escalated per SOP Sec 14.6.2.
Elizabeth Velasquez escalated to Walter Finch. Joon-ho Park placed hold on new Lakewood PO releases.
Material remains on Q-HOLD.

1. Formal past-due notice to Lakewood (K. Whitfield)
2. Informal hold on MER-PO-104918 (Joon-ho Park)
3. Supplier capability review initiation if COC not received by 04/25 (Theo Brandt)
4. Alternative sourcing evaluation — Ridgeline Precision Axles (Elizabeth Velasquez)

evt-022.description:

Lakewood required to provide COC covering PO MER-PO-104821 (all three SKUs) by 12:00 CDT today.
If not received: formal supplier audit initiated, matter referred to VP Supply Chain.
Assembly Line 1 line-down risk confirmed by Aditi Krishnamurthy — AX-04827-B2 stock exhausted within 5 business days.

evt-035.summary: ⚠ PRODUCTION RISK: Assembly Line 1 — AX-04827-B2 Projected Stockout
evt-035.description:
Production Planner Aditi Krishnamurthy: Assembly Line 1 (rear axle housings) projected to hit ZERO usable AX-04827-B2 stock by approximately April 28.
All 44 units from REC-20260414-001 remain on Q-HOLD (NCR-MER-2026-0247).
If quarantine not released before this date: LINE DOWN on Assembly Line 1.
Downstream impact: rear axle output delayed ~8–10 business days.
Mitigation: emergency sourcing from Ridgeline Precision Axles (SUP-0157) under evaluation.

evt-036.summary: ⚠ PRODUCTION RISK: Assembly Line 1 — FG-91144-A1 Projected Stockout
evt-036.description:
Production Planner Aditi Krishnamurthy: FG-91144-A1 (Forged Gear Blank, 8-spline) current on-hand: 50 usable units.
200 units in Q-HOLD (NCR-MER-2026-0247). Projected stockout approximately May 1 if quarantine not released.
Part of same Lakewood receipt REC-20260414-001.

evt-037.summary: Production Schedule Review — Line 1 Impact Assessment
evt-037.description:
Aditi Krishnamurthy (Production Planning) meets with Elizabeth Velasquez and K. Whitfield.
Agenda: AX-04827-B2 and FG-91144-A1 quarantine impact; rerouting options for Line 1; confirm April 28 risk window.
Alternative: reroute Line 1 to alternate assemblies — delays rear axle output ~8–10 business days.
evt-037.location: Production Planning Office, Gear Systems Inc., Meridian MS
